ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the entity */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the entity's central location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the entity's central location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the entity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the entity in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data type definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the dataset belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the dataset belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the dataset belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restrictions" (
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction */,
  "restriction_name" TEXT /* Name of the restriction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the restriction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the restriction became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the restriction expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the restriction (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restriction_datasets" (
  "restriction_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restriction dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the restriction belongs to */,
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restriction the dataset belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the restriction dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the restriction dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restriction_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restriction_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restriction_datasets_restriction_id FOREIGN KEY ("restriction_id") REFERENCES restrictions ("restriction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the prediction belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the prediction belongs to */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type the prediction belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to make the prediction */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_restrictions" (
  "prediction_restriction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction restriction */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the restriction belongs to */,
  "restriction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restriction the prediction belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the prediction restriction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the prediction restriction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_restrictions_restriction_id FOREIGN KEY ("restriction_id") REFERENCES restrictions ("restriction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_restrictions_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the publication can be accessed */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status (e.g., published, in press) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
